name: Block, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Purpose At Block, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, "Block" or "we"), we are building technology that enables people and businesses to participate more fully in the economy. Our purpose is economic empowerment, helping individuals and businesses manage, move, and grow their money through simple and connected tools.
